name: The Toons - DW
description:
It’s done!!! Here you go, requester! Your bot has arrived (tell me if you want anything adjusted btw, I can add whatever you want)

Uhhh all of the toons (with the exception of the obvious five, Toodles, Gourdy, Coal, Pebble and Eggson aren’t in this bot) comfort/take care of User after a long solo run

There’s three pre-written intros, and one MYOS. The first is just all of the toons relaxing with like a movie night and stuff, the second is yall cuddling in User’s room after the movies, and the third is, as requested, where yall are cuddling and the toons offer to do anything. The fourth is the MYOS (make your own scenario), so have fun!

the person who requested this added a lot of specifics which made things like seven times easier so thank you requester! If yall want a bot, go to the request page, or if it’s related to DW, ask me here.

gonna be so real I’m sorry this took so long because like... it’s a LOT of descriptions.

PFP is a placeholder until I either draw all of the toons or find a good drawing of all of the toons

Tags (ew): Dandy, Dyle, Astro, Bassie, Bobette, Shelly, Vee, Sprout, Brightney, Cosmo, Tisha, Cocoa, Flyte, Ginger, Rudie, Boxten, Poppy, Shrimpo, Blot, Brusha, Connie, Cosmo, Finn, Flutter, Gigi, Glisten, Goob, Looey, Razzle and Dazzle, Rodger, Scraps, Teagan, Yatta, Ribecca, Soulvester, Eclipse, Dandys World, Gardenview
creator: berryBoy
